title: BEM-866 codex step heartbeat
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
heartbeat = '''\n      - name: BEM-866 queue step heartbeat\n        if: always()\n        run: |\n          mkdir -p governance/runtime/curator_dispatch\n          echo "# BEM-866 codex queue step heartbeat" > governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CODEX_QUEUE_STEP_HEARTBEAT.md\n          echo "Status: QUEUE_STEP_EXECUTED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CODEX_QUEUE_STEP_HEARTBEAT.md\n          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CODEX_QUEUE_STEP_HEARTBEAT.md\n\n'''
anchor = '      - name: Commit and push everything\n'
if 'BEM-866 queue step heartbeat' not in text and anchor in text:
    text = text.replace(anchor, heartbeat + anchor)
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_HEARTBEAT_STEP_PATCHED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 heartbeat step patched\nStatus: PATCHED\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('added codex-runner queue step heartbeat')
"""
No issue comments.
